allow: Bash(python -c "import pandas as pd; df = pd.read_parquet\('price_history/AAPL.parquet'\); print\('SHAPE:', df.shape\); print\('DTYPES:'\); print\(df.dtypes\); print\('INDEX:', df.index.name, type\(df.index\).__name__\); print\('COLS:', df.columns.tolist\(\)\); print\('HEAD:'\); print\(df.head\(2\)\); print\('TAIL:'\); print\(df.tail\(2\)\)")
